name: Google Maps
description: Extraction instructions for Google Maps search results
context:
SITE SKILL — Google Maps:

DOM structure for search result lists:
- Each result is an <article> element in the sidebar
- Company name: article.querySelector('a[href*="/place/"]').textContent
- Rating: article.querySelector('img[alt*="stars"]') — alt text pattern is '4.5 stars 123 Reviews'
- Phone: text match /\+\d[\d\s\-]{7,}/ in article.textContent

CRITICAL — sidebar state:
- The sidebar shows either SEARCH RESULTS (list of articles) or COMPANY DETAIL (reviews, hours, photos)
- Clicking a result card switches to COMPANY DETAIL — article elements disappear
- Data extraction MUST run from the SEARCH RESULTS view, not company detail
- To return to results list: click the browser back button or re-navigate to the search URL
- Verify you are on the list view: document.querySelectorAll('article').length > 0

Pagination: infinite scroll (scroll the sidebar, not the map)
- The scrollable sidebar container is: div[role='feed'] or the left panel
- Scroll with: document.querySelector('[role=feed]').scrollTop += 800

Extraction pattern (localStorage accumulation):
  Step 1 — initialise once:
    localStorage.setItem('__orb__', '[]')

  Step 2 — extract and append on each scroll:
    var d=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('__orb__')||'[]');
    d.push(...Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('article')).map(el => ({
      name: el.querySelector('a[href*="/place/"]')?.textContent?.trim() || '',
      rating: el.querySelector('img[alt*="stars"]')?.alt?.match(/([\d.]+)\s*stars/i)?.[1] || '',
      reviews: el.querySelector('img[alt*="stars"]')?.alt?.match(/(\d+)\s*Reviews/i)?.[1] || '',
      address: el.textContent?.match(/·\s*([^·\n]+(?:St|Rd|Ave|Street|Road|Avenue|Drive|Terrace)[^·\n]*)/)?.[1]?.trim() || ''
    })).filter(r => r.name.length > 1));
    localStorage.setItem('__orb__', JSON.stringify(d)); d.length

  Step 3 — after scrolling to the end:
    save_csv { storageKey: "__orb__", filename: "google-maps-results" }
